name: mcp-general-doctor
description: Python-native MCP safety adapter for the General Doctor persona. Calls medical-mcp-toolkit upstream and enforces docs/medical/medical-ai-safety-policy.md (red-flag escalation, output filtering, no PHI, no medication dosing).

never_does: expose raw clinical-order language (ECG / troponin / aspirin if not contraindicated / IV …)
schedule appointments without explicit user confirmation

tools.name: doctor_red_flags
tools.description: Screen reported symptoms for emergency red flags. Adapter regex runs first; if it fires, returns an escalation envelope and never asks upstream.

tools.name: doctor_general_info
tools.description: Plain-language educational explanation of a health topic via searchMedicalKB. Strips diagnostic / dosing / clinical-order language before returning.

tools.name: doctor_self_care
tools.description: General self-care guidance, gated on red-flag triage. Refuses to give self-care if any red flag is present (adapter regex OR upstream emergency acuity).
